last_episode_to_air.name: To the Sea
last_episode_to_air.overview: Kyle reluctantly joins forces with a mysterious stranger in an attempt to end the possession threat once and for all, but fears the man may be hiding something. Megan struggles to escape her captors. Reverend Anderson shares an unexpected source of strength with his old friend, Chief Giles.

name: Outcast
overview: Kyle Barnes has been plagued by possession since he was a child. Now an adult, he embarks on a spiritual journey to find answers, but what he uncovers could mean the end of life on Earth as we know it.

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: Outcast, based on the Skybound/Image comic title by creator Robert Kirkman and artist Paul Azaceta, follows Kyle Barnes, a young man who has been plagued by demonic possession all his life. Now, with the help of Reverend Anderson, a country preacher with personal demons of his own, Kyle embarks on a journey to find answers to obtain a normal life he has never known. But what Kyle discovers could change his fate — and the fate of the world — forever.

seasons.name: Season 2
seasons.overview: In second two, the exploration and mystery of what lies behind the supernatural manifestations and why they are drawn to Kyle continues.  What Kyle has uncovered along the way could bring the end of life on Earth as we know it. Will he escape his demons and what price will he and those close to him pay?
